title: Mould Spray
features: PROFESSIONAL STRENGTH FORMULA THAT WORKS LIKE MAGIC! Highly powerful formula that cuts through 100% of mould and mildew from baths, sinks, showers, silicone seals, walls and tiles. With highly effective bleaching action. Also suitable for outdoor use.
SUITABLE FOR MULTIPLE SURFACES: Removes mould, mildew and fungus from walls, bathroom seals, grout, windows, outdoor furniture and more.

EASY TO USE: Simple trigger spray action that accurately targets problem areas of mould and mildew in damp areas of your home. Simply spray on affected area, leave for 20-30 mins then clean with a wet sponge - no scrubbing required

LONG-LASTING RESULTS: Say goodbye to recurring mould problems. Our formula tackles the problem at its root by removing the mould spores, delaying regrowth and ensuring a cleaner, healthier environment for longer periods between applications.
25 YEARS’ CLEANING EXPERTISE: Kilrock is renowned for our 25+ years of expertise in manufacturing high-quality, professional-standard cleaning products from our factory in Chesham.
description: Product Description Effectively removes stains caused by mould and algae Professional formula with bleaching action Prevents mould resurfacing Ideal for all interior surfaces in bathrooms, kitchens, basements etc Also effective on balconies, saunas, sheds, plant boxes and garden ornaments. Ingredients Sodium hydroxide, sodium hypochlorite Manufacturer Contact Information Kilrock Products Ltd., Unit 1b Alma Road Ind, Est, Chesham, Bucks, HP5 3HB. See more
